_meta.description: Reference list of external AI/asset-generation platforms admin-tier agents (can_generate_assets: true in agents-config.json) may use to produce assets and web-app prototypes for the asset_pipeline (year-tracker.json). This is a REFERENCE LIST ONLY — none of these are wired up as Worker integrations or hard dependencies. Names are as given by the project owner; verify current product names/URLs before any real integration.

platforms.name: Base64 tooling
platforms.purpose: Encode/decode small binary assets (icons, generated images) for inline embedding in index.html or D1 without a separate asset host.

platforms.name: Stitch
platforms.purpose: AI UI/UX design generation (Google's Stitch tool) — candidate for Designer (agent 9) to prototype UI mockups/screens.

platforms.name: Google AI Studio
platforms.purpose: Gemini model access/playground — already the source of the GEMINI_API_KEY used by data-center-agents; also usable ad hoc for prototyping prompts.

usage_notes: Agents proposing an asset record it in year-tracker.json's asset_pipeline.items at stage 'generated'.
Promotion to 'tested' / 'optimized' / 'implemented' happens via agent review (QA/Lead QA) — never auto-promoted.
Implementing an asset in this repo follows the same rules as any other change: no build step, validate before committing, pause before push.
